abstract: Make AI-agent rule application visible and auditable. Stable rule IDs anchored at markdown headings, a catalog, response-time trace blocks disclosing candidate vs applied rules, cross-session usage counters, severity + waiver semantics, and a deterministic validator that guards catalog/heading correspondence and importer drift. Tool-agnostic convention plus init/migrate/audit/report modes for adopting the pattern in any repo across Claude Code, OpenCode, and Codex.
